block_02: The start of a New Year often symbolizes new beginnings. Many people believe that it’s the best time to make changes in their lives and build new habits. So what if you were to do the same with your trading routine?
block_03: We have collected 6 practical tips that you may consider including in your New Year Resolutions. You don’t have to implement them all at once: just pick one or two that seem useful and introduce them to your trading strategy. Start small and strengthen your trading skills to get the most of the new opportunities coming to you in 2023!
block_07: What are ETFs and how to trade them?
block_10: An ETF (exchange-traded fund) is a type of trading instrument that combines a collection of assets, such as stocks, commodities, currencies, etc. Since it is essentially a basket, it includes assets with different levels of risk, allowing for more diversification. Find out more about these instruments and how to trade them in this material.
block_14: What Is Trading? Trading vs. Investing
block_15: Learn about the pros and cons of trading and investing, as well as their similarities and differences.
block_17: Margin Trading: How Does It Work?
block_18: Find out the main features of the margin balance and learn to open deals with this detailed guide.
